records.complexity_estimate: One-time commutator tool-library construction (~3s), then per solve: O(orbits) parity normalization, ~360 conjugated 3-cycle placements found by pair-BFS over <=9120 states each, and a potential-descent twist cleanup
records.notes: Level 2 solved by class-by-class commutator reduction (full slice generator set supported).
